title: Gonçalo Matos
text:
Hi, I’m Gonçalo!
I am a programmer who is interested in writing (not only code), mobility and equality.
I just finished my master’s degree in Transportation Systems at Instituto Superior Técnico (University of Lisbon), where I keep exploring the transportation world, assisting U-Shift urban mobility lab on their research projects.


💻🛤️🌍

title: Projects
text:
Other contributions

OpenStreetMap, where I often contribute with improvements on transit data (04/2025 - Present)
gtfsrouter, an R package to route and analyse GTFS data (06/2025)



Presentations

SiteSelection, a keynote speech on this R package to identify complex areas, presented on Streets4All Closing Seminar (12/2025)
Dawn transit network analysis, a lecture on scenario analysis of transit data, presented on Rosa Félix course on Modelling of Transport Systems course of the Master in Transportation Systems at Instituto Superior Técnico (University of Lisbon) (10/2025)
Making a website with Quarto, a lecture on using Quarto publishing system to build a website with R, presented on Robin Lovelace course on Tools and Skills for Reproducible Transport Research, part of DTN Annual Forum 2025 (09/2025)



Events organization

Streets4All Closing Seminar, an event to share the results of this project focused on dynamic and equitable reallocation of urban street space

Event microsite creation, booklet edition, poster creation and logistic coordination

DTN Annual Forum 2025, the EIT Doctoral Training Network annual event that gathers experts, scholars, and industry leaders from around the world to discuss the latest advancements in urban mobility (09/2025)

Event website creation (with Quarto), logistical support

title: Get in touch!
text:

Beyond academia
In my leasure time I like to cycle, read, take photographs and get involved with the community. If you share any of these hobbies, feel free to connect with me using the links below!
 Strava  Goodreads  Unsplash
